listitem.para: * r = results tlist from a first stage estimation
* np = 'noprint' if the user does not want to print the results
- resulth('resul1st') = results tlist of the first stage regression
- resulth('dfnum') = degrees of freedom of the numerator
- resulth('dfden') = degrees of freedom of the denominator

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes the value of the Xi² hetero test. Results are stored in a tlist and displayed on screen if the user has not given as second argument 'noprint'.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
